options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: plando_connections
options.description:
Generic connections plando. Format is:
- entrance: "Entrance Name"
  exit: "Exit Name"
  direction: "Direction"
  percentage: 100
Direction must be one of 'entrance', 'exit', or 'both', and defaults to 'both' if omitted.
Percentage is an integer from 1 to 100, and defaults to 100 when omitted.

options.name: total_heart_stars
options.description: Deprecated. Use max_heart_stars instead. Supported for only one version.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Zero: collect the Heart Stars, and defeat Zero in the Hyper Zone.
Boss Butch: collect the Heart Stars, and then complete the boss rematches in the Boss Butch mode.
MG5: collect the Heart Stars, and then complete a perfect run through the minigame gauntlet within the Super MG5
Jumping: collect the Heart Stars, and then reach a designated score within the Jumping sub-game

options.name: goal_speed
options.description:
Normal: the goal is unlocked after purifying the five bosses
Fast: the goal is unlocked after acquiring the target number of Heart Stars

options.name: max_heart_stars
options.description:
Maximum number of heart stars to include in the pool of items.
If fewer available locations exist in the pool than this number, the number of available locations will be used instead.

options.name: heart_stars_required
options.description:
Percentage of heart stars required to purify the five bosses and reach Zero.
Each boss will require a differing amount of heart stars to purify.

options.name: jumping_target
options.description: The required score needed to complete the Jumping minigame.

options.name: remote_items
options.description: Enables receiving items from your own world, primarily for co-op play.

options.name: filler_percentage
options.description: Percentage of non-required Heart Stars to be converted to filler items (1-Ups, Maxim Tomatoes, Invincibility Candy).

options.name: trap_percentage
options.description: Percentage of filler items to be converted to trap items (Gooey Bags, Slowness, Eject Ability).

options.name: gooey_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap is a Gooey Bag (spawns Gooey when you receive it).

options.name: slow_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap is Slowness (halves your max speed for 15 seconds when you receive it).

options.name: ability_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap is an Eject Ability (ejects your ability when you receive it).

options.name: stage_shuffle
options.description:
None: No stage shuffling.
Same World: shuffles stages around their world.
Pattern: shuffles stages according to the stage pattern (stage 3 will always be a minigame stage, etc.)
Shuffled: shuffles stages across all worlds.

options.name: boss_shuffle
options.description:
None: Bosses will remain in their vanilla locations
Shuffled: Bosses will be shuffled amongst each other
Full: Bosses will be randomized
Singularity: All (non-Zero) bosses will be replaced with a single boss
Supports plando placement.

options.name: animal_randomization
options.description:
Disabled: all animal positions will be vanilla.
Shuffled: all animal positions will be shuffled amongst each other.
Full: random animals will be placed across the levels. At least one of each animal is guaranteed.

options.name: copy_ability_randomization
options.description:
Disabled: enemies give regular copy abilities and health.
Enabled: all enemies will have the copy ability received from them randomized.
Enabled Plus Minus: enemies (except minibosses) can additionally give you anywhere from +2 health to -1 health when eaten.

options.name: strict_bosses
options.description: If enabled, one will not be able to move onto the next world until the previous world's boss has been purified.

options.name: open_world
options.description:
If enabled, all 6 stages will be unlocked upon entering a world for the first time. A certain amount of stages
will need to be completed in order to unlock the bosses

options.name: ow_boss_requirement
options.description: The amount of stages completed needed to unlock the boss of a world when Open World is turned on.

options.name: boss_requirement_random
options.description:
If enabled, boss purification will require a random amount of Heart Stars. Depending on options, this may have
boss purification unlock in a random order.

options.name: consumables
options.description: When enabled, adds all 1-Ups and Maxim Tomatoes as possible locations.

options.name: starsanity
options.description:
When enabled, every star in a given stage will become a check.
Will increase the possible filler pool to include 1/3/5 stars.

options.name: gifting
options.description:
When enabled, the goal game item will be sent to other compatible games as a gift,
and you can receive gifts from other players. This can be enabled during gameplay
using the client.

options.name: game_language
options.description: The language that the game should display. This does not have to match the given rom.

options.name: allow_bb
options.description:
Allow Boss Butch variants of bosses in Boss Shuffle.
Enabled: any boss placed will have a 50% chance of being the Boss Butch variant, including bosses not present
Enforced: all bosses will be their Boss Butch variant.
Boss Butch boss changes are only visual.

options.name: kirby_flavor_preset
options.description: The color of Kirby, from a list of presets.

options.name: kirby_flavor
options.description:
A custom color for Kirby. To use a custom color, set the preset to Custom and then define a dict of keys from "1" to
"15", with their values being an HTML hex color.

options.name: gooey_flavor_preset
options.description: The color of Gooey, from a list of presets.

options.name: gooey_flavor
options.description:
A custom color for Gooey. To use a custom color, set the preset to Custom and then define a dict of keys from "1" to
"15", with their values being an HTML hex color.

options.name: music_shuffle
options.description:
None: default music will play
Shuffled: music will be shuffled amongst each other
Full: random music will play in each room
Note that certain songs will not be chosen in shuffled or full

options.name: virtual_console
options.description:
Adds the ability to enable 2 of the Virtual Console changes.
Flash Reduction: reduces the flashing during the Zero battle.
Color Changes: changes the color of the background within the Zero Boss Butch rematch.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
